name: Pancakes
ingredients: 1 cup flour, 2 eggs, 0.5 cup milk, 2 tbsp butter
instructions: Whisk ingredients together. Cook on a hot griddle until bubbles form. Flip and cook until golden brown.

name: Spaghetti Bolognese
ingredients: 200g spaghetti, 300g minced beef, 1 can chopped tomatoes, 1 onion, 2 cloves garlic
instructions: Boil pasta. Brown minced beef with chopped onion and garlic. Add tomatoes and simmer. Pour over pasta.

name: Chicken Caesar Salad
ingredients: 200g chicken breast, 1 head romaine lettuce, 0.5 cup croutons, 3 tbsp caesar dressing
instructions: Grill chicken until cooked through and slice. Chop lettuce and toss with croutons dressing and chicken.

name: Grilled Cheese Sandwich
ingredients: 2 slices bread, 2 slices cheddar cheese, 1 tbsp butter
instructions: Butter bread and grill with cheese inside until golden and melted.

name: Chocolate Cake
ingredients: 1 cup flour, 0.5 cup cocoa powder, 1 cup sugar, 2 eggs
instructions: Mix ingredients and bake until cooked through.

name: Fruit Yogurt Bowl
ingredients: 1 cup yogurt, 0.5 cup strawberries, 0.5 banana, 2 tbsp granola
instructions: Layer yogurt with fruits and granola on top.
